product_description: Iconic running shoe with visible Air cushioning, premium leather and mesh upper, and bold colour-blocked design. A streetwear staple since 1990.
target_audience: Sneaker enthusiasts aged 18-35, fashion-conscious urban consumers who value heritage brands and street culture

brand.visual_style: High-contrast, editorial, modern street photography aesthetic

key_message: Air Max 90 — Iconic since day one.
